query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS donations_508 (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  donor_user_id INT,
  donor_name VARCHAR(255),
  donor_email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  donor_address TEXT,
  amount_cents INT NOT NULL,
  fund_id INT,
  allocation_type ENUM('academy', 'grants', 'trust', 'community', 'general') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  payment_method ENUM('stripe', 'cash', 'check', 'transfer', 'other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'stripe',
  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),
  stripe_checkout_session_id VARCHAR(255),
  payment_status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  is_recurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recurring_frequency ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually'),
  receipt_number VARCHAR(100),
  receipt_sent_at BIGINT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  FOREIGN KEY (fund_id) REFERENCES donation_funds(id)
);
